nasb.text: When good things increase, those who consume them increase. So what is the advantage to their owners except to look on?

esv.text: When goods increase, they increase who eat them, and what advantage has their owner but to see them with his eyes?

cnv.text: 財物增加，吃用的人也增加，物主除了眼看以外，還有甚麼益處呢？

ccb.text: 财富增加，消费的人也增加，这对财富的主人有什么益处呢？只是过眼烟云罢了！

csbs.text: 财物增加，吃用的人也增加，而主人除了眼看以外，还有什么益处呢？
